info.title: MICROSERVICE_DEV_User Account Management API
info.description: The User Account Management API enables organizations to seamlessly manage user accounts within their systems. This API facilitates the creation and configuration of user profiles, allowing for tailored access control and personalization. Common use cases include onboarding new users, adjusting permissions, and integrating with identity management solutions. It is designed for developers working on applications that require robust user account capabilities.

post.description: This operation allows you to create a new account by providing the necessary details. Ensure that all required fields are filled out correctly to avoid errors during account creation.

requestBody.description: Creates a new account by providing the required information in the request body. This includes details such as account type, owner information, and any other necessary attributes defined in the schema.

500.description: An unexpected server error occurred while processing the request.

404.description: The requested resource could not be found.

200.description: Request completed successfully, returning the requested data.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.title: Internal Server Error Response

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the error occurred.

status.description: Indicates if the request was successful or not.

message.description: Detailed message providing additional context about the error.
message.example: Unable to process bank account creation request due to internal service failure.

path.description: The path of the API endpoint that was accessed when the error occurred.

trace.description: Stack trace or additional detailed information related to the error.

suggestion.description: A suggestion for the user on what to do next.
suggestion.example: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.description: This schema defines the structure of the response returned when an internal server error occurs during account operations.

example.message: Unable to process bank account creation request due to internal service failure.

details.message: Database connection timeout while creating account details.

example.suggestion: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

customerId.description: The identifier for the customer associated with the error.

errorCode.description: A specific error code categorizing the type of error.

message.description: A message providing contextual details about the error.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.title: ErrorResponse

timestamp.description: A timestamp indicating when the error occurred.

status.description: The status of the request, indicating if it was successful or not.

error.description: A brief error message indicating the type of error.

message.description: Detailed error message providing more context.
message.example: Bank account details not found for the provided customer.

path.description: The path of the request that resulted in the error.

trace.description: A stack trace for debugging purposes.

suggestion.description: A helpful suggestion for resolving the error.
suggestion.example: Please verify the customer ID and try again.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.description: Schema representing the error response for a 404 Not Found error in the application.

example.message: Bank account details not found for the provided customer.

details.message: No active account exists for the requested customer.

example.suggestion: Please verify the customer ID and try again.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.title: Account Creation Request

customerId.description: The unique identifier for the customer who owns the account.

accountType.description: The type of account being created (e.g., savings, checking).

currency.description: The currency in which the account will be denominated (e.g., USD, EUR).

initialDeposit.description: The amount of money that will be deposited into the account initially.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.description: This schema represents the request body required for creating a new account.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.title: AccountCreationResponse

accountId.description: The unique identifier of the created account.

customerId.description: The unique identifier of the customer associated with the account.

accountType.description: The type of the account (e.g., savings, checking).

status.description: The current status of the account (e.g., active, inactive).

currency.description: The currency in which the account is denominated.

balance.description: The current balance of the account.

message.description: A message providing additional information about the account creation.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAccount-CreateAcc.description: Response schema for the creation of a new account.

environment.name: environment
environment.description: Environment used to select the workflow branch.

serviceCategory.name: serviceCategory
serviceCategory.description: Service category used to select the workflow branch.
